title: Even when things don't workout — anti-villain-arc seed (2023)
html:
Even when things don't workout — anti-villain-arc seed (2023)

Source: 2023-06-17 Apple Note. Three-paragraph reflection that frames giving-up as the literal "satan comment" / villain arc. Affective opposite of the 2024 09 manifesto.

TL;DR

  • "Even when things don't workout, they do workout. As long as you don't give up" — the persistence-as-success maxim, restated from earlier 2019 maxim notes (2019 10 16, 2019 11 09) but with new language.
  • "Maybe I heard the random satan comment because giving up, giving in to the void is that" — Yahir explicitly frames quitting/numbness as the villain arc. Strongest theological framing of effort-as-virtue in the corpus.
  • "Become a villain becoming soulless and not allowing for warm opening to happen. The villain arc songs" — references a specific genre of songs Yahir associates with the dark-mode response.
  • "Set your heart ablaze type beat" — the antidote: feel "thunder in your heart," lean into motion, iterate. Same energy thread as walk with gods eyes and soul as beacon.
  • This is a rare meta-emotional note where Yahir watches himself almost flip into villain-mode and writes the bookmark.

Connections

  • walk with gods eyes
  • soul as beacon
  • 2024 09 12 never forget manifesto — the integrated post-villain version
  • fear of not doing
  • disconnected from outcome
